title: Algebraic description of complex conjugation on cohomology of a smooth projective hypersurface

errors.description: The statement and proof of Theorem 2.3 is not correct. What was described in the paper is an order 2 operation which swaps the Hodge components, which gives the complex conjugation only when the Hodge component has dimensions 1. But our description does not give the complex conjugation in the general case where the Hodge component has a bigger dimension
